title: The Man in the White Suit
writer: Roger MacDougall, John Dighton, Alexander Mackendrick
actors: Alec Guinness, Joan Greenwood, Cecil Parker
plot: An altruistic chemist invents a fabric which resists wear and stain as a boon to humanity, but big business and labor realize it must be suppressed for economic reasons.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 3 nominations total
